default_say: Good to see you again — whenever you're ready.

transmutation_engine.say: Welcome back for your check-in! Send me your user JSON (see the scenarios README) and I'll score this check-in against your graduation baseline.

args.interpretation: Scripted harness check-in: scored against the graduation baseline via the mock model.

check_in_agent.say: Your check-in is scored and compared against your graduation baseline. Open the Reassessment tab on the right to see the regression panel — the verdict there comes from the deterministic engine, not from me.
